rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CAROL H. ELVIN TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Irder To Compel Skyhawk Properties, Inc.'S Answers To Form Ans Specially Prepare Interr. And For Order Awarding Sactions.
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner's Motion To Compel Respondent Skyhawk Properties, Inc.'s Answers To Form and Specially Prepared Interrogatories, Set One, is moot as responses have been served. The court will not determine the adequacy of the responses on this motion. The late responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Respondent in the amount of $636.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. (612/HEWLETT)
